channel.title: BN Media Films News
channel.description: Latest news, updates and stories from BN Media Films.

item.title: Happy International Women's Day from BN Media Films
item.description: We celebrate the courage, strength, and resilience of women everywhere and the stories we tell that honour them.

item.title: Why Is "Sure Banker" Taking Longer Than Expected?
item.description: A production update from BN Media Films about the Sure Banker project.

item.title: Catch Up on Not Perfect Date — Season 1: All Episodes in One Place
item.description: Watch all 15 episodes of Not Perfect Date Season 1 right here.

item.title: Class of Secrets — All Episodes
item.description: Watch all episodes of Class of Secrets by BN Media Films.

item.title: BN Media Films and Patmos Studios Partnership
item.description: BN Media Films announces a partnership with Patmos Studios.
